scripts.check: vp run -w fmt:check && vp run -w lint && vp run -w tc && vp run -w test
scripts.deploy: vp run -w deploy:api && vp run -w deploy:web && vp run -w deploy:blog
scripts.dev: vp run --filter agent-driver build && vp run --filter @mosoo/api --filter @mosoo/web --parallel dev
scripts.e2e:harness-contract: vp exec bun test e2e/runtime-signal-collector.test.ts e2e/preview-env.test.ts e2e/preview-live-harness.test.ts
scripts.fmt: vp fmt --write dev/config/bun-script-types.d.ts dev/config/graphql-codegen.ts dev/config/knip.jsonc dev/config/prek.toml dev/config/tsconfig.base.json dev/config/vite-plus.shared.ts dev/scripts vite.config.ts justfile apps pkgs e2e --ignore-path .gitignore
scripts.fmt:check: vp fmt --check dev/config/bun-script-types.d.ts dev/config/graphql-codegen.ts dev/config/knip.jsonc dev/config/prek.toml dev/config/tsconfig.base.json dev/config/vite-plus.shared.ts dev/scripts vite.config.ts justfile apps pkgs e2e --ignore-path .gitignore
scripts.lint: vp run -w cf:types && vp lint vite.config.ts dev/config/bun-script-types.d.ts dev/config/vite-plus.shared.ts dev/scripts apps pkgs e2e
scripts.test: vp run --filter @mosoo/api --filter agent-driver --filter @mosoo/web --filter @mosoo/ag-ui-session --filter @mosoo/agent-package --filter @mosoo/contracts --filter @mosoo/db --filter @mosoo/id --filter @mosoo/runtime-catalog --filter @mosoo/runtime-events --filter @mosoo/session-policy --filter @mosoo/skill-package test && vp run -w graphql:codegen:check
